title: justicia oblongifolia
intro: Justicia oblongifolia, also known as Kala Bel, is a medicinal plant native to India, belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It is traditionally used to treat a variety of health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Justicia oblongifolia include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate symptoms of malaria. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a topical application to treat skin conditions and wounds.
